name: Ceremonial Merlot
description: Notes If a priest would like to maximize their dps but does not have the Vesture of Duality, using this tome could be a solution.
effects: Heal: 120 (+0.88 per WIS over 70) HP Party Effect: Healing [60/s] (+0.44 per WIS over 70) for 4.4 seconds Self Effect: ATT Boost (+15 ATT) for 6 seconds
Sommelier’s Gamble: 1% chance to become Drunk for 2 seconds after taking at least 50 damage.Cooldown: 2 seconds
